decisions_made: Organized tasks by workflow stage (loader, intake, bypass, planning, assignment, docs)
Prioritized integration validation (T4-T5) to ensure downstream compatibility
Included documentation task (T6) to prevent future confusion on synthetic fixture usage
Applied 'fail-fast on malformed input' pattern per NFR constraint

knowledge_applied: Multi-stage workflow structure (intake → planning → assignment → implementation → QA)
Artifact-driven state management using {CHANGE-ID}/ directory conventions
Session logging in structured JSON format
Synthetic test data patterns and fixture handling
Query-first rule for all knowledge access

notes: Synthetic fixture story validates the workflow itself, not a user-facing feature
Tasks organized by workflow stage with integration validation emphasis
Knowledge gap: current fixture loader behavior (needed for T1 error handling)
Knowledge gap: specific ADO actions at each stage (needed for T3 bypass coverage)
All tasks include Definition of Done with testing and code comment requirements
Story constraints (minimal changes, no ADO requirement, easy to verify) incorporated into T1-T3 complexity estimates
